executives.name: Paul Jacobson
executives.background: Paul A. Jacobson is Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of GM. Before joining GM in 2020, he served as CFO of Delta Air Lines.

executives.name: Paula Rosput Reynolds
executives.background: Paula Reynolds is the President and CEO of Preferential Ltd. She previously served as Vice Chairman and Chief Restructuring Officer of AIG and Chairman and CEO of Safeco Corporation.

executives.name: Roy Bostock
executives.background: Chairman of the Partnership for New York City and former Chairman of Yahoo! Inc.

executives.name: Theresa Wise
executives.background: Former Senior Vice President and Chief Information Officer of Delta Air Lines. Joined the board in 2020.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Information Officer
